Video.summary: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!
Video.title: Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1

Image.alt: Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1
Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1
Fabric to Fashion: Challenge 1 Part 1

Video.summary: Time for another frog food today we’re gonna turn my Dog Bowie into an anime character with a pop punk style. From inspo to highlights we got it covered. So sit back, relax, and enjoy!
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character
Digital Painting - Frog Food: I Turned My Dog Into An Anime Character

Video.summary: Subtle spring accents, like this Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower branch, can add some lovely touches to your home. This free flower craft idea shows you how to make small tissue paper flowers and attach them to a branch for a realistic-looking faux flower. Once you create this cute DIY flower craft, you can add them to a vase, hang them on the wall, or combine them with other floral ideas for a unique DIY bouquet. These tissue paper cherry blossoms make excellent springtime decorations!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower
FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Video.summary: Turn those old magazines into ALL NEW Fabulous crafts!! Craft along with Froggy as she shows you 5 EASY Magazine Crafts you can finish today! From a Potted Plant to an entire Doll Bookshelf and More!

Video.summary: Going on a trip? Need a gift tag? Looking for a cute purse accessory? This Personalized DIY Luggage Tag is the perfect craft that can serve a number of purposes. Not only is this the perfect die cut craft that you can completely personalize and make your own, but you can also complete this craft in less than an hour. If you really need a new luggage tag for a trip but don't want to run to the store and buy one, this craft video can show you how easy it is to make your own!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag
FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag
